title: Mad Mrelf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mad Mrelf''' was a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Alcohol/Legends|liquor]] renowned for its potency. Reportedly, it was strong enough that many [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who had imbibed the liquor awoke in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] labor camps or other unpleasant places after a drinking spree. [[Salla Zend]] was known to drink Mad Mrelf.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
